label: ILC1_NK
evidence: Reynolds 2021 main text: 'ILC1/NK have overlapping features of ILC1 and NKs, as described.' Identified among 4 innate lymphocyte clusters that were CD161(KLRB1)+ CD3(CD3D/CD3G)-. This population shares markers with both ILC1 and NK cells, reflecting the biological continuum between these two group 1 innate lymphoid cell types. ILC1_NK in Gopee 2024 corresponds to ILC1/Natural Killer (NK) in Reynolds 2021.
